---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for this extension
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use case

What are you trying to accomplish? A short description of the workflow that prompted this request is more useful than a description of the feature in the abstract.

## Ideal behavior

What would you like the extension to do? If you have a specific UI placement, dialog wording, or keyboard shortcut in mind, sketch it here.

## Workarounds today

How are you handling this without the requested feature? (Manual scripting? The original Groovy script? A different extension?) This helps gauge urgency and informs whether the request is a usability gap or a capability gap.

## Scope

- Does this affect the legend window, the launch surfaces (toolbar / menu / shortcut), or something else?
- Is this a one-image action, a project-wide concern, or something else?
- Does it interact with other extensions you use?

## Additional context

Anything else: links to similar features in other tools, references to a paper or method, screenshots, prior issue threads.
